pending_tasks.description: Connect LevelSpecBridge to ExportBridge for auto-sized asset export

pending_tasks.notes: Implemented: mathart/sdf/noise.py with Perlin, Simplex, fBm, ridged, turbulence, domain warp. 6 presets (terrain/clouds/lava/water/stone/magic). 7 colormaps. Registered as noise_texture_generator in math registry. 44 new tests.

pending_tasks.description: Add GPU-accelerated rendering path when CUDA is available
PDF Distillation — inject reference knowledge into the project
pending_tasks.notes: Primary knowledge injection method. User uploads PDFs to Manus chat -> Manus reads and distills -> writes to knowledge/*.md -> pushes to GitHub -> user pulls and runs evolution. Next session ID: DISTILL-008.

pending_tasks.description: Workspace management: inbox hot folder + output classification + file picker
pending_tasks.notes: Implemented: mathart/workspace/manager.py with WorkspaceManager (inbox/output dirs), pick_files() GUI dialog, auto-scan & process. CLI commands: init-workspace, scan, pick, texture.

capability_gaps.name: DIFFERENTIABLE_RENDERING
capability_gaps.description: Differentiable rendering requires NVIDIA GPU for real-time parameter gradients

capability_gaps.name: UNITY_SHADER_PREVIEW
capability_gaps.description: Unity Shader preview requires Unity Editor for live rendering feedback

capability_gaps.name: AI_IMAGE_MODEL
capability_gaps.description: High-quality sprite generation requires a diffusion model (e.g., SDXL-Turbo)
capability_gaps.requires: GPU + Stable Diffusion API or local model

changes: Added SpriteAnalyzer: extract style fingerprints from reference sprites
Added SpriteSheetParser: auto-cut spritesheets into frames
Added SpriteLibrary: persistent, dedup-aware sprite knowledge store
Added ArtMathQualityController: 4-checkpoint quality control across full pipeline
Added ProjectMemory: cross-session persistent brain (PROJECT_BRAIN.json)
Added SessionHandoff: seamless context continuity across conversations
Added LevelSpecBridge: translate level requirements to asset specs
Added StagnationGuard: invalid iteration detection + AI arbitration
Added DeduplicationEngine: knowledge dedup with semantic similarity
Added Unity Shader knowledge module + Pseudo3D extension skeleton
Added MathPaperMiner: automated math model paper discovery
Added 6 knowledge files: PCG, PBR, SDF, color science, procedural animation, differentiable rendering
Total: 371 tests passing, 0 failures
evolution_history.notes: Major architecture upgrade: self-evolving brain system fully operational

changes: TASK-004 DONE: Implemented noise texture generator (mathart/sdf/noise.py)
- Perlin 2D noise with improved fade curve
- Simplex 2D noise on simplex lattice
- fBm (fractional Brownian motion) with configurable octaves/lacunarity/persistence
- Ridged multi-fractal noise for terrain/water caustics
- Turbulence noise for smoke/fire/magic effects
- Domain warping for organic distortions (lava, marble)
- 6 presets: terrain, clouds, lava, water, stone, magic
- 7 colormaps: gray, earth, sky, lava, water, stone, magic
- Registered as noise_texture_generator (stable) in MathModelRegistry
- TEXTURE capability gap RESOLVED: now 9 stable + 1 experimental models
TASK-006 DONE: Workspace management system
- inbox/ hot folder with sprites/, sheets/, knowledge/ subdirectories
- output/ classified storage: textures/, effects/, palettes/, characters/, levels/, exports/
- Auto-scan & process: mathart-evolve scan
- GUI file picker: mathart-evolve pick (tkinter, falls back gracefully)
- File picker integrated into add-sprite/add-sheet (omit path to open dialog)
- Texture generation CLI: mathart-evolve texture [preset]
- Workspace init CLI: mathart-evolve init-workspace
Added 44 new tests (test_noise_texture.py)
Total: 424 tests passing, 0 failures
evolution_history.notes: TEXTURE gap closed, workspace management operational, 10 math models

custom_notes.core_vision: User uploads PDFs to Manus -> Manus manually distills knowledge into knowledge/*.md tables and math models -> Manus pushes to GitHub -> User pulls locally and runs autonomous evolution.
custom_notes.distillation_strategy: Prefer manual high-quality distillation by Manus over automated LLM extraction. When user uploads a PDF, read it, extract mathematical/artistic rules, and write them directly to the knowledge base.
